title: Lead Instructional Designer at American Institute

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at American Institute
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Instructional Designer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
